creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
rodrigo@ I'm not in a rush, just reporting for tracking purposes (other users might be curious about the fetchStatURL error). 

15:amd64 404, and so on. 


root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # pkg update

Processing entries: 100%

All repositories are up to date.
